data.name: Hot Therapy
data.detailed_description:
Hot Therapy is a real-time 3D Adult simulation game where you satisfy your female clients by applying various massage styles.
As a talented and powerful masseur, you having pleasant times with the customers you design. If you are successful in the therapy part, your clients will reward you.


Character Customization
* Create the sexy girl of your dreams.
* Edit body shapes as you wish.
* You can use any Skins you want and edit them as you wish.
* You can customize Hair types, Tattoos, Makeup and Eyes.
* Sexy clothing options.
* Shoe and accessory options


Massage Therapy
* Massage your client's sore areas. Their soft bodies will satisfy you...

Chiropractic Therapy
* Satisfy your client with Chiropractic therapy!

Hot Therapy
* Try to make the client orgasm.

Happy End
* Real time 3D Sex experience.
* A unique experience with different creative positions.
* Set your rhythm!
* Experience it from any angle you want with POV or FreeCam.

data.short_description: Hot Therapy is a sex game where you design the beautiful women of your dreams, invite them to your office, heal them and having exciting moments with them. Enjoy being a strong and charming therapist!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 阿拉伯文, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 土耳其文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-6300
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Intel(R) Core(TM) i5 6400
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7+
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-6300
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660
